title: Prince Louis's Birthday Photo on a Boat
summary: Prince Louis, the youngest son of Prince William and Princess Catherine, turned eight years old. To celebrate his birthday, his parents shared a new photo of him on a family holiday in Cornwall. In the picture, Louis is smiling and wearing a blue zip-up jumper. He is standing on a boat with his arms folded, and the sea is behind him. The photo was taken by a photographer named Matt Porteous. Louis was born on April 23, 2018, at St Mary's Hospital in London. He has an older brother, Prince George, and an older sister, Princess Charlotte. Louis is fourth in line to become king. He is known for being funny and playful. He sometimes goes to special events like the Trooping the Colour parade.

background_read: Prince Louis is part of the British royal family. His father, Prince William, will become king one day. The family often shares photos on birthdays and holidays.

WHAT: A new photo was released to celebrate Prince Louis's eighth birthday
WHERE: The photo was taken on a boat during a family holiday in Cornwall, England
WHY: To mark Prince Louis's birthday and share the happy moment with the public
